title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a solar system simulation by deriving orbital motion from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. This demonstrates the model's ability to apply physics reasoning to complex dynamical systems.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 building a solar system simulation by deriving orbital motion from physics first principles, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It matters as a demonstration of applying physics reasoning to a complex dynamical system rather than relying on lookup or hardcoded values. The key takeaway: the model derived orbital dynamics from physics and produced eclipse predictions from the resulting simulation.
